parsed.production_notes: The video features real human actors with natural movements, realistic skin textures, and consistent lighting. There are no AI artifacts like distorted fingers, uncanny facial expressions, or unnatural physics.

characters.appearance: Older Asian male, heavy build, light complexion. He has short black hair parted to the side and wears dark-rimmed glasses.
characters.wardrobe: White polo shirt with a small logo on the left chest, blue jeans.

characters.appearance: Young South Asian male, medium build, medium complexion. He has short dark hair and a full, neatly trimmed beard.
characters.wardrobe: Black denim jacket over a plain white t-shirt. He wears a silver watch on his left wrist.

scenes.setting: Office environment, daytime, blurred background with warm lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: An older Asian man with glasses sits comfortably, looking directly at the camera. He has his arms crossed over his chest. The background is a softly blurred office setting with warm, ambient lighting and some indoor greenery visible. The framing is a medium close-up, focusing on his upper body and facial expressions.

scenes.visual_description: The scene starts with Character A in a rounded rectangular inset against a white background, which quickly cuts to a full-screen shot of him. Large, bold text overlays appear sequentially over him as he speaks. He maintains a steady, professional gaze throughout the shot.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Wispr Flow is coming after one of the most exciting problems in AI today.
Character A says: It is reimagining the primary interface between humans and machines.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young South Asian man with a beard sits at a light wooden table. He is looking down towards a laptop on the table, then looks up slightly towards the camera. The background is a blurred, modern office space with circular overhead lighting. The lighting is natural and warm.

scenes.visual_description: Character B is shown sitting at a desk, gesturing towards his laptop. Text overlays appear on screen as he speaks, introducing the demonstration.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: Let me show you how it works.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Let me show you
how it works

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid white background, serving as a blank canvas.

scenes.visual_description: An animated graphic of a voice waveform connecting to various app icons (Gmail, Slack, Messages) briefly appears on a white background. Text overlays accompany the animation.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: Just press the shortcut and Flow works in any application.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young South Asian man with a beard is looking downwards, focused on something off-camera. He is framed from the chest up against a blurred office background with warm lighting.
A solid white rectangular area, serving as a blank placeholder.

scenes.visual_description: The screen is split horizontally. The top half shows Character B looking down at his computer. The bottom half displays a screen recording of a messaging application where text is being dictated and corrected in real-time. A voice waveform graphic overlays the center of the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: Hey Hans, wanna meet at 5? Actually, um... let's do... let's do 5:30 PM.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Hey Hans, wanna meet at 5? Actually, um... let's do... let's do 5:30 PM.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young South Asian man with a beard sits at a light wooden table, looking directly at the camera. The background is a blurred, modern office space with circular overhead lighting.

scenes.visual_description: A brief full-screen shot of Character B speaking directly to the camera, transitioning to the next demonstration. Text overlays appear as he speaks.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: It's great for writing code.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young South Asian man with a beard is looking downwards, focused intently. He is framed from the chest up against a blurred office background.
A solid light gray rectangular area, serving as a blank placeholder.

scenes.visual_description: The screen is split horizontally. The top shows Character B looking down, while the bottom shows a code editor interface where text is being dictated. Callout text boxes appear highlighting specific features of the dictation.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: Hey, can you look at auth.ts, constants.ts, and enums.ts and fix the bugs across all of them?
scenes.on_screen_text:
Hey! Can you look at auth.ts, constants.ts, and enums.ts and fix the bugs across all of them?
TAGS FILES AUTOMATICALLY
GETS VARIABLE NAMES RIGHT

panels.panel_visual_description: A young South Asian man with a beard sits at a wooden table. He brings a black smartphone very close to his mouth and whispers into it. He then moves the phone away and holds it up towards the camera, displaying the blank screen of the phone. The background is a blurred office setting.

scenes.visual_description: Character B speaks to the camera, then demonstrates whispering into his smartphone. He holds the phone up to the camera to show the dictated text on the screen. Text overlays appear throughout the scene.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: And the best part is, you can even whisper.
Character B says: You can install Wispr on your iPhone.
Character B says: And that got it perfectly.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young South Asian man with a beard sits at a wooden table with his hands clasped in front of him. A closed laptop is on the table to his right. He looks directly at the camera. The background is a blurred, well-lit office space.

scenes.visual_description: Character B is shown in a rounded rectangular inset against a white background. As he speaks, numerous corporate logos float around him within the inset. Text overlays appear above and below the inset video.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: Today, Wispr Flow is used by teams at half of the Fortune 500 companies to save thousands of hours every year.
